content.en:
This time to enter the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, the same plan as the last time.

That is, to use a replica body and a will clone to drag the nameless kun, and his second replica body to collect resources.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void, and immediately attracted the lock of the Nameless Kun.

The Nameless Kun was full of endless hostility towards any creature that entered its territory, and it descended to attack Ye Tian as soon as possible.

A big war began.

Bang!!!

This time, Ye Tian was obviously much easier, although he still couldn't beat the Nameless Kun, but with many means, he could completely drag the Nameless Kun, making it difficult for the Nameless Kun to kill him.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's other copy body infiltrated the eighth layer void and began to look for other resources.

Ye Tian still had a lot of places to look for before, so this time he had enough time to look for resources.

Moreover, some resources that were of little use to him, he also collected, and could keep them to cultivate the human race.

Time passed, Ye Tian searched all the borders of the eighth layer void, and everywhere he went, not to mention that there was not an inch of grass left, but it was almost there.

It is worth mentioning that Ye Tian actually found a small number of polar creation substances.

After a long time, there were no good things in the eighth layer void for the time being, and all of them were found by Ye Tian.

"Should I go to the ninth layer of the Void?"

Ye Tian hesitated.

There are terrifying creatures like the Nameless Kun in the eighth layer of the void, so is the ninth layer even more dangerous?

Unfortunately, he didn't know anything about the situation in the Ninth Layer Void.

"Let the will clone go in and give it a try, it's just a big deal to fall a will clone!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian let the will clone enter the ninth layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

However, he was surprised to find that the space-time barrier between the ninth layer of the void and the eighth-layer void was too strong, and it took Ye Tian a long time to break the space-time barrier and successfully enter the ninth layer of the void.

If he hadn't dragged the Nameless Kun, he would definitely not have been able to enter the ninth layer of the void.

......

As soon as he entered the ninth layer of the void, Ye Tian was immediately hit hard.

The endless sword aura tore through the body of Ye Tian's will clone, even if he tried his best to resist, it would be difficult to withstand it, if he didn't have many means to counteract the attack, he was afraid that he would be killed in an instant.

Time passed by second, Ye Tian continued to perceive the situation of the ninth layer of the void, and only sensed a sword, and this piece of void was only this thing, and everything else was reduced to nothing.

"Perfect Treasure!"

Ye Tian was shocked, he didn't expect that the ninth layer of the Nine Rivers Void would actually give birth to a perfect treasure.

Moreover, this was obviously not an ordinary perfect treasure, even the medium perfect treasure he obtained was far inferior to this sword.

"High-grade Perfect Treasure? No, even a high-grade Perfection Treasure can't make my body unable to carry it! After all, I haven't touched it, it's still far away, could it be that this is a super-perfect treasure?"

At the thought of the super-perfect treasure, Ye Tian was extremely shocked and delighted.

There was only one super-perfect treasure he had seen so far, and that was the Daoless Tower.

However, the Daoless Tower's aura was constricted, and it would not release such a terrifying power, so anyone could approach the Daoless Tower.

"However, this perfect treasure has not yet been fully conceived. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

A perfect treasure, if it has not been fully conceived, its power is extremely violent, but it will be protected by heaven and earth and will not be disturbed by the outside world.

And the ninth-layer void was the protective area of this super-level perfect treasure, if he hadn't forcibly entered the ninth-layer void, Ye Tian wouldn't have known about the existence of this super-level perfect treasure.

"A super-grade perfect treasure, even a top force like the Daoless Tower will start a war for this!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

And now, this perfect treasure has been discovered by him.

And it's so remote that he's probably the only one who's found this super-perfect treasure.

"It's a pity that this super-perfect treasure hasn't been conceived yet, and when it is really conceived, I'm afraid it will take an incomparably long time. But that's fine, if it's born now, I won't be able to take it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But even so, at present, this super-perfect treasure can still bring unimaginable benefits to Ye Tian.

That is, it can help Ye Tian comprehend the Extreme Dao.

The Extreme Way is also a kind of Tao, a Tao that overrides the Path of Perfection.

The path of perfection contains 3.3 billion changes, but the path of perfection is different, it contains only one change, and the so-called path of perfection is to gather the 3.3 billion changes of the path of perfection into one change, that is, to condense the power of the way to the extreme.

Once you comprehend the extreme path, your combat power will be extremely terrifying.

However, according to his understanding of the Wudao Tower, even some high-level perfect controllers could not comprehend the slightest bit of the extreme path at all, and it was too difficult to completely comprehend the extreme path.

Basically, only by condensing the three and three billion changes into one billion can you be regarded as comprehending the fur of the Extreme Dao, and at this time you can burst out with a certain amount of power.

However, those who are perfectly in control do not know how to comprehend the Extreme Path, because there is no Extreme Path between heaven and earth, and therefore there is no reference.

However, there is one treasure that contains the ultimate way, and that is the super-perfect treasure.

For example, the Wudao Tower contains the power of the Extreme Dao, but ordinary people are not qualified to participate in enlightenment, unless they are the real high-level members of the Wudao Tower.

Other than that.

When the super-perfect treasure was being conceived, the Extreme Dao was also being conceived, and the sword path aura that Ye Tian was bearing was actually the release of the power of the Extreme Dao, and at this time, it was easiest to comprehend the Extreme Dao of the sword.

"This is a great opportunity to comprehend the Ultimate Path of the Sword!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Once he comprehends the Extreme Dao, how terrifying his strength will be, it will definitely exceed everyone's imagination.

"However, the power of the Extreme Dao is too terrifying, my body can't last long, but it doesn't matter, if I comprehend a little bit of the mystery of the Extreme Dao, I can hold on here for a long time. "

"In the next few years, let's practice here, anyway, I condense and copy my body very quickly, it's a big deal to condense again and again, it's worth paying this price!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the Extreme Dao of the Sword here.

It didn't take long for the doppelganger to crumble.

So, Ye Tian's copy body entered here and continued to comprehend the Extreme Dao of the Sword.

When this copy body couldn't hold it anymore, Ye Tian's other copy body left the eighth layer of the void, got rid of the nameless kun, and copied the copy body again, and then entered the eighth layer of the void, and then one copy body dragged the nameless kun, and the other copy body entered the ninth layer of the void to comprehend the extreme path of the sword.

It's a bit of a hassle, but it's worth it.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of eternal years have passed.
